name: THE LOCK: Mixed Reality Puzzle Adventure

reviews.review_title: Puzzles are good but game is Glitchy
reviews.review_description: So I was really enjoying this game. I'm on the first chapter and I completed 50 percent of the puzzles and was able to move on to the next chapter but decided to see if I could complete all the puzzles in the chapter instead. Now I'm stuck in this chapter. I have 2 puzzles left unsolved but I can't go anywhere. I've tried going to settings but nothing happens. I've tried uninstalling the game and reinstating, but I'm still stuck in the same spot. I'm part my refund time so I'm unable to get a refund. Not sure what else to do.  I will rate higher if Devs can fix this for me.

I do really like this game even though I haven't managed to solve one puzzle yet 😅 
The only thing I'm finding irritating is 1, I'm having to stand up to play, as if I sit down the puzzle is positioned to high to see it properly. 2. If I decide I want to change puzzles I have to exit the game and then go back in, I have tried all the buttons on my hand sets and nothing allows me to jump back. 3. When I start up the game it  doesn't give me the opportunity to review the instructions so I can't work out if I'm doing something wrong or have missed something.

reviews.review_title: Pure masterpiece for a VR puzzle game
reviews.review_description: Been a huge puzzle game fan for over 10 yrs. Thx for this developer bring me back to my childhood, in a more reality way. Though the cons of this game is some maps might need a tutorial to help ppl come through, but way more cons let this game a ez 5/5 for me.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your incredibly kind words! We’re absolutely thrilled to hear that the game resonates with your 10+ years of love for puzzle games—and that it brought back childhood memories in a VR reality.

Your feedback about tutorial needs for certain maps is invaluable! We’re already working on enhancing in-game guidance to help players navigate those trickier challenges without losing the joy of discovery. It means the world to us that you still gave it a 5/5 despite this—your support fuels our drive to make the experience even better.

Happy puzzling, and here’s to more immersive adventures!

reviews.review_description:
The Lock offers a beautifully minimal yet deeply engaging puzzle experience that’s uniquely suited to VR. You’re presented with a floating lock mechanism that unfolds like a 3D sculpture. Using subtle hand movements, you slide and rotate each piece, gradually revealing the intricate solution. What starts as abstract manipulation slowly transforms into a coherent, almost magical system — just like forming a key, where every dent and curve interacts with the lock’s hidden mechanics.

The sensation of solving each phase is immensely satisfying. There's no timer, no pressure — just you, your mind, and the soothing ambiance of a quiet, surreal space. The music and visuals create a meditative atmosphere, encouraging mindfulness and experimentation. It’s not just a puzzle — it’s a moment of calm focus that rewards observation and patience.

This is a gem for puzzle lovers and fans of tactile gameplay. Whether you play in short bursts or lose yourself in the satisfying rhythm of trial and insight, The Lock is a subtle masterpiece that turns motion into meaning. Highly recommended for anyone seeking something thoughtful and beautifully executed in VR.

developer_response.body:
Your words about The Lock have left us truly moved—thank you for capturing its spirit so beautifully.​
We set out to create something that felt like a quiet, tactile conversation between the player and the puzzle. That "floating lock mechanism unfolding like a 3D sculpture" was born from a desire to make VR’s unique sense of presence work with the puzzle, not against it. Every slide, rotation, and subtle hand movement was designed to feel like tending to something delicate—like you’re uncovering a secret rather than "beating" a level.​
The meditative vibe was intentional, too. No timers, no pressure—just that surreal space, the soft ambiance, and the slow burn of figuring it out. It means the world to hear that it became a "moment of calm focus" for you; that’s exactly the feeling we chased.​
To know it resonated as "more than a puzzle"—that’s the highest praise. Your observation about "motion turning into meaning"? That’s the heart of what we wanted to achieve.​
Thank you for letting it unfold for you, and for taking the time to share this. It fuels us to keep crafting experiences that feel this personal. Here’s to many more moments of quiet insight.

reviews.review_title: Old school fun new school twist
reviews.review_description: Old school puzzle game with a story mode behind it?! You had me at "The". I just wish we were better at puzzles. -punkrokreview

I am mostly an Escape Room fan, and tend to prefer mechanical puzzles where you need to figure out codes, symbols and patterns.  I wasn't sure about this, because in real life I find those little metal pretzel-type puzzles and the wooden lock boxes to be a bit tedious.  But I am so blown away by this game, and have been addicted to it.  It's beautiful to play (love the passthrough option!) and some of the puzzle boxes have kept me stumped for several nights in a row.  Simple concept, but beautifully executed.  Great for when you have 20 minutes (or several hours!) where you want a mental challenge but don't want to immerse yourself in storyline. I can recommend this!

developer_response.body: Dear player, thank you for sharing your thoughtful feedback and for giving our game a chance—especially as an escape room enthusiast with a preference for mechanical puzzles! We’re absolutely thrilled to hear that you’ve been so positively surprised by the experience, and that it’s become an addictive challenge for you. We’re honored to be part of your puzzle - solving journey, and we’ll keep refining the experience to ensure every moment offers the right mix of frustration and triumph.

reviews.review_description: There is a gamebreaking bug - every puzzle (I guess) can be solved by hold a piece of puzzle an zoom in or zoom out any element that in consequence i will be able to take out of puzzle shape.

reviews.review_title: Love the puzzles navigation is frustrat
reviews.review_description: I just got the game and I completed the first level of games all with 3 stars.  But it won't let me advance to chapter 2.  There is no way for an option.  I have quit  the game and came back in several times and I'm still at the chapter one boat with all boxes completed in the air. I can't even review the tutorial anymore.  Why am I stuck here with no way to continue to play other chapters? I looked on YouTube and I can't even find this game.  Does anyone have any advice? Super frustrated.

developer_response.body:
Dear player,
once you finished half of puzzles in scene one, a story page will pop out and the second scene is unlocked. If you missed the page, you can always go to the second scene through the menu on your left hand (wrist back). Let me know if it doesn't show up.

reviews.review_description:
Fun game. Well, it WAS fun. My wife was having a grand old time. She was on chapter 1, got to the last two puzzles, spent a couple hours trying to figure them out, and gave up. One of the points I think game developers need to remember is that if something in VR stops you stone cold in your tracks, and takes up WAY TOO MUCH time to complete, or figure out, with no "help me" hint ability, it's going to get shelved because it turns into work, and the fun disappears. This was one of them it happened to. 

My wife asked me to give it a try on one of the last 2. I gave it 15 minutes and shelved it. And, as a side note, I hate the wands. Super frustrating to move things smoothly. It would be better to be able to ditch the wands, and use "your grip". It could be a fun game. But ...

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback! We have moderated the difficulty over the past few versions. Currently if any levels got stuck you can simply jump into next stages and solve the difficult ones first. (every stage need only 6 levels solved to jump into next stage).
We're designing some HINT system at this point. It's a bit complex work but we think we'll figure it out. As for the wands, we have the handtracking mode enabled but most players still like using the controllers for more accurate control. What's the part of the wands that bother you? It'd be great if you can explain a bit more :)

reviews.review_description: I agree with some of the other comments about the game. Some of the puzzles are difficult to solve, but for someone like myself that is the point of the game. The puzzle solver can rotate the puzzle 360 degrees while also being able to zoom in and out. You can see the puzzle at every angle. The graphics are extremely smooth and detailed. I really like and recommend this game. When I get frustrated I simply take a break. But I always come back because I have to complete the puzzle tasks.

developer_response.body: Glad you like it. We will keep improving the details and player experience. As our first game it took as some time to figure things out. Please keep posted on our future games :)

reviews.review_description: When you like puzzles, you definitely have to try this one. The puzzles are hard. Haven’t complete them all yet. But it is a lot of fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support and for recommending the game to fellow puzzle lovers. Your feedback fuels our passion to keep creating experiences that challenge and delight. Happy puzzling—we can’t wait for you to see what’s next!

reviews.review_description:
The Lock isn't a simple puzzle game but that can be a good thing! Some puzzles I got quite easily but there are several that have me completely stumped for the time being. That said you will definitely get your money's worth with this game as there are plenty of boxes to open and will really challenge your grey matter.

My only negative is that I'd love to be able to grab the puzzles and rotate with my hands, instead of just with the analogue sticks. It would feel more intuitive to me that way, but that's just my preference of course!

I'd definitely recommend to puzzle fans and you can check out my first impressions gameplay video over on my YouTube!
😁✌️☮️❤️

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed review of our game. We are delighted that you like the challenging and stimulating aspect of the puzzles. We have actually enabled handtracking that you can try out, but it's not perfect at this point. We'll keep improving the experience on this part.

We hope that through you, more puzzle game enthusiasts can discover our game. Please don't hesitate to share with us your thoughts on other possible improvements and follow our upcoming development dynamics.

reviews.review_description: Some puzzle are easy to solve and some puzzle sometime need an hour to solve it. Hand tracking little bit work fine but little bit difficult to rotate , when use touch controller work beautifully. It really worth to buy. Great work!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your feedback and kind words about the game! We truly appreciate your support and are thrilled to hear that you’ve enjoyed the experience. We completely understand the challenges you mentioned with hand tracking, particularly the difficulty in rotating objects, which we'll improve over time. Thank you again for your encouragement and for being part of our community. It means a lot to know that you find the game worth buying—this motivates us to keep pushing forward and delivering the best possible experience. We’ll keep you updated on our progress, so stay tuned for updates that address these areas and more.

reviews.review_description:
This reminds me of the small puzzles you would get in a cracker at Christmas… or then small metal puzzles would get in a set.

It’s frustrating at times, but relaxing… yes you can get both at the same time lol

Some are very easy and take seconds, some take a lot longer … and some I just can’t do! Grrr!! lol

It’s really good how you can zoom in and out, rotate the puzzle and grab and pull/slide parts… quite accurate.

I like the music in the background, it helps to keep you calm 

I do wish could turn off the day/night cycle though… as when it goes dark, it makes it trickier to tell the parts apart. And I can’t wait for the sun to rise again.

I also came across a couple of glitches and have these recorded if you would like to see them dev.
But this was only on one or two puzzles.. and there’s plenty to keep you going until they are fixed.

I found myself addicted to this, thought it would be a quick pick up and play and move to next game… but I kept playing and playing, determined to do the ones I could t.

Very enjoyable puzzle experience.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind review! Glad you like it! We'll update the game with 25 new levels + 4 new scenes with a storyline, it will be updated for free if you have already bought the current version (remember to click update to newest version around January 27th). 

We'll definitely fix the glitch you mentioned. If you can join our Discord (https://discord.gg/z2dRMuGsP5) and posted the glitched or other suggestions in bug/suggetions section that'd be great. We'll also add a setting to configure daytime/nightime/time cycle on/off in next version!

reviews.review_description: A brilliant puzzle game. Some easy, some extremely challenging and some in between. I keep popping in and out of this, my aim being to solve at least one a day!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your appreciation! This is our debut work. We will continue to optimize the details and experience. Please don't hesitate to recommend this game to more players who love this type of game!

reviews.review_description:
I am an absolute fanatic of mixed reality and virtual reality puzzle games, having tried an enormous number of them. And let me tell you, THE LOCK is in a league of its own!

What THE LOCK offers is nothing short of extraordinary. Its unique mechanism, meticulously designed for VR and spatial movement, is a game-changer. The music is not just well-designed; it's captivating and immersive, adding an extra layer of charm to the experience. The riddle system is incredibly interesting and when combined with the puzzles, it creates a truly engaging and intellectually stimulating adventure.

And then there's the zoom in and out system. Oh my goodness! This feature truly maximizes the potential of VR and transports you into the mysterious and enchanting universe of THE LOCK as if by magic. It's like being transported to a whole new world where every puzzle solved is a step closer to uncovering the secrets that lie within.

I cannot recommend THE LOCK highly enough. It's a must-play for anyone who loves VR puzzle games and is looking for an unforgettable experience, especially given the prize is very reasonable.

Jumped into the early access game, and it was like opening a surprise birthday present.
This is such a unique puzzle game where you unlock boxes of intricate puzzles to unravel.
I found myself engrossed for ages with that 
Just one more box mentality.
Great calming music with a great back drop, can’t seem to unlock MR yet but already the game is looking so good.
Congratulations to The Lock.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your incredibly kind and enthusiastic feedback! We're absolutely thrilled to hear that you've had such a wonderful experience with our early - access game. It's amazing to know that it felt like opening a surprise birthday present to you.
Your description of getting engrossed in the "just one more box" mentality really shows how much you've enjoyed the unique puzzle - solving aspect of the game. And we're glad that the calming music and backdrop have added to your overall enjoyment.
We also wanted to let you know that we're hard at work on some exciting updates. We're currently in the process of updating the levels, and we're very excited to announce that there will be 25 new levels and 4 new scenes. Along with these, there will be a brand - new story for you to discover and enjoy.
All of these updates are scheduled to be released by the end of this month. We can't wait for you to explore these new additions and see what you think. Your support means the world to us, and we hope you'll continue to have a great time with our game.
Once again, thank you for your support and kind words. If you have any other thoughts or suggestions, please don't hesitate to share them with us.

reviews.review_description: This is a great puzzle game, different from others. It is also quite relaxing...really enjoyed the music and messages within each box. At such a cheap price you can't be wrong. Definitely recommend if you want to spend some time squeezing your brain 😉

developer_response.body: Thanks Aimar for your review! At this point we're working hard to polish tons of details and will also reveal more content in future versions (we'll update new levels for free as well). It is our first released game and we want to make it a solid experience for puzzle lovers. Feel free to join our Discord to share more thoughts and advice!
